description: Primitive-complete generated/search-owned decode-attention target: whole-cache split-KV tile with register-resident online-softmax state and PV accumulation, scored as a TILE+COMBINE lifecycle bundle. This is the post-A3.10 path; it exists to avoid another metadata-only or naive-fusion search failure.

supported_profiles.authority: decode W==D token/s with byte-identical greedy tokens

generated_lifecycle_clean_baseline.role: first generated comparator; route-clean but slow

negative_control.lesson: naive producer-consumer fusion removes flash_prob_32 and flash_partial_coop_vec_whole_cache_32_128 but regresses W==D

exposed_instruction_primitives.evidence: A2/A3 generated flash_* programs route without owned_flash_*
A3.1 can expose a vdot2-named score path, but current W==D transfer is not proven
GEMV lane-map/cross-lane lessons exist; attention lane ownership/reduction mapping is not yet a winning route

exposed_memory_primitives.caveat: decode T=1 LDS staging must not collapse occupancy or duplicate cache-served reads

excluded_primitives.reason: hand-owned whole kernel; allowed only as oracle/fallback, never as proof of generated search
hand-owned combine; allowed only as oracle/fallback unless a generated combine lifecycle is explicitly selected
this manifest names the target, but no generated/search-owned implementation has passed structural, correctness, and W==D gates yet

known_negative_controls.lesson: max/prob metadata fusion is not enough
one-for-one partial PV replacement is not enough
naive prob+partial producer-consumer fusion regresses W==D

correctness_gate.quality_gate: greedy token identity against current owned route unless a future lossy profile explicitly changes this

structural_gate: owned_flash_combine absent unless explicitly classified as fallback comparator outside candidate timing
lane ownership and reduction mapping reported
TILE+COMBINE bundle reported as one lifecycle candidate

proof_of_coverage.claim: This manifest is sufficient to judge whether the next candidate honestly targets the owned route's primitive boundary, but it is not yet sufficient to claim a true exhaustive generated-search failure until the required lowerings are implemented or explicitly blocked.
coverage_complete_for: preventing metadata-only fusion from masquerading as the target
classifying owned-kernel reliance as not pure search
recording A3.10 as a negative control
coverage_incomplete_for: generated cross-lane reduction for m/l/accD lifecycle
generated packed fp16 dot transfer inside the full tile
generated register-resident online-softmax+PV tile passing W==D

classification_detail: The primitive-complete target is now declared, but no generated/search-owned implementation has passed the structural and W==D gates. The next valid failure must say whether it is blocked by codegen, runtime lifecycle, correctness, or no-transfer; it must not be reported as pure search exhaustion unless all required primitive classes are exposed and sampled.
